mapper.sql: homepage_id, apply_idx, excursions_idx, agency_name, agency_tel, agency_address, applicant_name, applicant_tel, applicant_email, age, guide_name, guide_tel, start_date, start_time, end_date, end_time, personnel, apply_state, ip, remarks, add_date, apply_id, applicant_member_id, member_key, self_info_yn
mapper.select: SELECT b.homepage_id, b.apply_idx, b.excursions_idx, b.agency_name, b.agency_tel, b.agency_address, b.applicant_name, b.applicant_tel, b.applicant_email, b.age, b.guide_name, b.guide_tel, a.start_date, a.start_time, a.end_date, a.end_time, b.personnel,b. apply_state, ip, b.remarks, b.add_date, b.apply_id, b.applicant_member_id, b.member_key, b.self_info_yn FROM CMS_EXCURSIONS a, CMS_EXCURSIONS_APPLY b WHERE a.homepage_id = b.homepage_id AND a.excursions_idx = b.excursions_idx AND b.homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND b.member_key = #{member_key} order by a.start_date desc, a.start_time desc

SELECT
FROM CMS_EXCURSIONS_APPLY WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND apply_idx = #{apply_idx}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_EXCURSIONS_APPLY WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND EXCURSIONS_IDX = #{excursions_idx} AND MEMBER_KEY = #{member_key}
mapper.update: UPDATE CMS_EXCURSIONS_APPLY SET agency_name = #{agency_name}, agency_tel = #{agency_tel}, agency_address = #{agency_address}, applicant_name = #{applicant_name}, applicant_tel = #{applicant_tel}, applicant_email = #{applicant_email}, age = #{age}, guide_name = #{guide_name}, guide_tel = #{guide_tel}, start_time = #{start_time}, end_time = #{end_time}, personnel = #{personnel} WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND apply_idx = #{apply_idx}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM CMS_EXCURSIONS_APPLY WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND apply_idx = #{apply_idx}
mapper.select:
SELECT A.START_DATE, A.END_DATE, A.AGENCY_NAME, A.APPLY_IDX, A.EXCURSIONS_IDX, B.DATE_TYPE, (SELECT CODE_NAME FROM CMS_CODE C WHERE B.HOMEPAGE_ID = C.HOMEPAGE_ID AND C.CODE_ID = B.DATE_TYPE AND C.GROUP_ID = 'H0001') AS CODE_NAME, A.APPLICANT_MEMBER_ID, A.MEMBER_KEY, A.HOMEPAGE_ID FROM CMS_EXCURSIONS_APPLY A, CMS_EXCURSIONS B WHERE A.EXCURSIONS_IDX = B.EXCURSIONS_IDX AND A.HOMEPAGE_ID = B.HOMEPAGE_ID AND A.HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND A.APPLY_STATE = '3'
AND (substr(A.START_DATE,1,7) = #{plan_date} OR substr(A.END_DATE,1,7) = #{plan_date})

SELECT A.START_DATE, A.END_DATE, A.AGENCY_NAME, A.APPLY_IDX, A.EXCURSIONS_IDX, B.DATE_TYPE, (SELECT CODE_NAME FROM CMS_CODE C WHERE B.HOMEPAGE_ID = C.HOMEPAGE_ID AND C.CODE_ID = B.DATE_TYPE AND C.GROUP_ID = 'H0001') AS CODE_NAME, A.APPLICANT_MEMBER_ID, A.MEMBER_KEY, A.HOMEPAGE_ID FROM CMS_EXCURSIONS_APPLY A, CMS_EXCURSIONS B WHERE A.EXCURSIONS_IDX = B.EXCURSIONS_IDX AND A.HOMEPAGE_ID = B.HOMEPAGE_ID AND A.HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND A.APPLY_STATE = '3' AND A.START_DATE >= TO_DATE(#{start_date}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND A.START_DATE < TO_DATE(#{end_date}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
